item.title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.description:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.

* Music radio streamer

* Plays local music files

* CD-R music burner

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

item.title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]
item.description:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]

item.title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.description:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]

item.title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: rollerozxa
item.itunes:summary:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.description:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]

item.title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: MyTonWallet [Crypto]
item.itunes:title: MyTonWallet [Crypto]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
MyTonWallet
(Crypto)
The most feature-rich web wallet and browser extension for the TON Network – with support of jettons, NFT, TON DNS, TON Sites, TON Proxy, and TON Magic.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
MyTonWallet
(Crypto)
The most feature-rich web wallet and browser extension for the TON Network – with support of jettons, NFT, TON DNS, TON Sites, TON Proxy, and TON Magic.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MyTonWallet
(Crypto)
The most feature-rich web wallet and browser extension for the TON Network – with support of jettons, NFT, TON DNS, TON Sites, TON Proxy, and TON Magic.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.description:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]

ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]

item.title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
